glosses.vi: bữa ăn nhẹ; đồ ăn vặt

sentences.target: Wir machen jetzt eine Jause im Park.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈmaxən jɛtst ˈaɪ̯nə ˈjaʊ̯zə ɪm paʁk/

translations.de: Wir machen jetzt eine Jause im Park.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈmaxən jɛtst ˈaɪ̯nə ˈjaʊ̯zə ɪm paʁk/
translations.en: We’re having a snack in the park now.
translations.es: Ahora estamos tomando un tentempié en el parque.
translations.fr: On prend une collation au parc maintenant.
translations.it: Ora facciamo uno spuntino al parco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们现在在公园吃零食。
translations.pt: Agora estamos fazendo um lanche no parque.
translations.vi: Bây giờ bọn mình đang ăn vặt trong công viên.
translations.ar: نحن الآن نتناول وجبة خفيفة في الحديقة.
translations.nl: We nemen nu een tussendoortje in het park.
translations.hi: हम अभी पार्क में हल्का नाश्ता कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Nå spiser vi en matbit i parken.
translations.id: Sekarang kami sedang makan camilan di taman.
translations.sv: Nu äter vi mellanmål i parken.
translations.ro: Acum mâncăm o gustare în parc.
translations.cs: Teď si dáváme svačinu v parku.
translations.da: Nu spiser vi en snack i parken.
translations.ja: 今、公園でおやつを食べています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb, finite present (1st pl. with 'Wir'); takes the direct object 'eine Jause' and a locative PP.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular, determiner of 'Jause'.
Common noun (feminine), direct object; Austrian German for 'snack'.
Contraction of preposition 'in' + definite article 'dem'; introduces a dative locative PP.
Common noun (masculine), dative singular as object of the preposition 'im'.

sentences.target: Ich nehme die Jause morgen mit zur Schule.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈneːmə diː ˈjaʊ̯zə ˈmɔʁɡn̩ mɪt tsuːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə/

translations.de: Ich nehme die Jause morgen mit zur Schule.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈneːmə diː ˈjaʊ̯zə ˈmɔʁɡn̩ mɪt tsuːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə/
translations.en: I’m taking the snack to school tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana me llevo la merienda al colegio.
translations.fr: Demain, j’emmène mon goûter à l’école.
translations.it: Domani porto lo spuntino a scuola.
translations.zh-Hans: 我明天把零食带到学校。
translations.ru: Завтра я возьму перекус в школу.
translations.pt: Amanhã vou levar um lanche para a escola.
translations.he: מחר אני מביא חטיף לבית הספר.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi mang đồ ăn nhẹ đến trường.
translations.ar: سآخذ وجبة خفيفة إلى المدرسة غدًا.
translations.nl: Morgen neem ik een tussendoortje mee naar school.
translations.uk: Завтра я візьму перекус до школи.
translations.hi: मैं कल स्कूल नाश्ता लेकर जाऊँगा.
translations.el: Αύριο θα πάρω σνακ στο σχολείο.
translations.nb: I morgen tar jeg med en matbit til skolen.
translations.id: Besok saya bawa camilan ke sekolah.
translations.sv: Imorgon tar jag med ett mellanmål till skolan.
translations.ro: Mâine duc o gustare la școală.
translations.cs: Zítra si vezmu do školy svačinu.
translations.da: I morgen tager jeg en snack med i skole.
translations.ja: 明日、学校におやつを持っていく。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (1st sg. present); part of the separable verb 'mitnehmen' together with the particle 'mit'.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular, determiner of 'Jause'.
Common noun (feminine), direct object of 'nehme'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase.
Separable verbal particle combining with 'nehme' to form 'mitnehmen' ('to take along/with').
Contraction of preposition 'zu' + definite article 'der'; governs dative; introduces a destination PP.
Common noun (feminine), dative singular as object of 'zur'.

sentences.target: Die Kinder bekommen nach dem Schwimmen eine Jause.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈkɪndɐ bəˈkɔmən naːx deːm ˈʃvɪmən ˈaɪ̯nə ˈjaʊ̯zə/

translations.de: Die Kinder bekommen nach dem Schwimmen eine Jause.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈkɪndɐ bəˈkɔmən naːx deːm ˈʃvɪmən ˈaɪ̯nə ˈjaʊ̯zə/
translations.en: The kids get a snack after swimming.
translations.es: Los niños toman una merienda después de nadar.
translations.fr: Les enfants prennent une collation après la piscine.
translations.it: I bambini fanno uno spuntino dopo la piscina.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们游完泳后吃零食。
translations.yue: 小朋友游完水之後食零食。
translations.pt: As crianças fazem um lanche depois de nadar.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ ăn nhẹ sau khi bơi.
translations.ar: الأطفال يتناولون وجبة خفيفة بعد السباحة.
translations.nl: De kinderen krijgen een tussendoortje na het zwemmen.
translations.hu: A gyerekek úszás után kapnak harapnivalót.
translations.hi: बच्चे तैरने के बाद हल्का नाश्ता करते हैं.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά παίρνουν σνακ μετά το κολύμπι.
translations.nb: Barna får en matbit etter svømmingen.
translations.ro: Copiii primesc o gustare după înot.
translations.da: Børnene får en snack efter svømning.
translations.ja: 子どもたちは泳いだあとにおやつを食べます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural, determiner of 'Kinder'.
Common noun, plural; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (3rd pl. present); ditransitive semantics 'receive/get', taking a direct object.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a temporal PP.
Definite article, dative singular, determiner of 'Schwimmen'.
Nominalized infinitive ('das Schwimmen'), head of the PP complement of 'nach'.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular, determiner of 'Jause'.
Common noun (feminine), direct object of 'bekommen'.

sentences.target: Opa stellt eine Jause auf den Tisch.
sentences.reading: /ˈoːpa ʃtɛlt ˈaɪ̯nə ˈjaʊ̯zə aʊ̯f deːn tɪʃ/

translations.de: Opa stellt eine Jause auf den Tisch.
translations.ipa: /ˈoːpa ʃtɛlt ˈaɪ̯nə ˈjaʊ̯zə aʊ̯f deːn tɪʃ/
translations.en: Grandpa puts a snack on the table.
translations.es: El abuelo pone una merienda en la mesa.
translations.fr: Papi pose une collation sur la table.
translations.it: Il nonno mette uno spuntino sul tavolo.
translations.pt: O vovô coloca um lanche na mesa.
translations.tr: Dede masanın üzerine bir atıştırmalık koyuyor.
translations.vi: Ông đặt đồ ăn nhẹ lên bàn.
translations.ar: الجد يضع وجبة خفيفة على الطاولة.
translations.nl: Opa zet een tussendoortje op tafel.
translations.hu: Papa egy harapnivalót tesz az asztalra.
translations.hi: दादाजी मेज़ पर नाश्ता रखते हैं.
translations.el: Ο παππούς βάζει ένα σνακ στο τραπέζι.
translations.nb: Bestefar setter en matbit på bordet.
translations.sv: Farfar ställer fram ett mellanmål på bordet.
translations.ro: Bunicul pune o gustare pe masă.
translations.da: Bedstefar sætter en snack på bordet.
translations.ja: おじいちゃんがテーブルにおやつを置く。

tokens.explanation: Common kinship noun used as subject (vocative-like use without article).
Finite main verb (3rd sg. present) meaning 'to put/place'.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular, determiner of 'Jause'.
Common noun (feminine), direct object of 'stellt'.
Preposition expressing direction; governs accusative with motion ('auf den Tisch').
Definite article, masculine accusative singular, determiner of 'Tisch'.
Common noun (masculine), object of the preposition 'auf' (directional).

Les enfants prennent une collation après la piscine.

I bambini fanno uno spuntino dopo la piscina.
